title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: BONANZA CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: general medical exams, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, and mental health evaluations. 31863 Highway 70 Bonanza, OR 97623 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 1pm-5pm Email (541) 545-1820 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 545-1820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Walk-ins accepted. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Childhood Immunization Contraception General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BONANZA CLINIC
